evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: real impact and ownership in a growing international scale-up
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Startup framing with 'growing' and 'scale-up' language emphasizes velocity over governance concerns.
evidence.domain_risk: Transport/SaaS platform; billing and financial insights are responsibilities
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: SaaS platform with billing/financial dashboards but no explicit regulatory or compliance language suggests moderate risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Build and maintain data models and pipelines; internal dashboards
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Established infrastructure with multiple dashboard types suggests mid-stage maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Build and maintain data models; Create Lightdash dashboards; Develop internal BI dashboards; Support product analytics
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Mix of specific tools (Lightdash, Mixpanel) alongside generic 'collaborating across departments' language.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: operational and financial insights; account management; product analytics
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Product analytics + finance/billing focus indicates mixed orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic verbs (design, build) but framed in startup growth context suggests mixed autonomy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or infrastructure expectations.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of testing frameworks, data quality, or validation practices.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: billing and cost-analysis dashboards; operational and financial insights
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: operational reliability and financial reporting are concerns but secondary to growth and delivery.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Build and maintain data models and pipelines
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Maintenance and building suggests fix_scale posture.
